description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named build_image that uses the docker:git Docker image and the docker:dind service. The job should only run on the master branch. In the script, first log in to registry.gitlab.com with the gitlab-ci-token and $CI_BUILD_TOKEN, then send a webhook to http://barker.ninja:3000/webhook containing ${DISCORD_CHANNEL_ID} and a message with the commit URL ${CI_BUILD_REF}, then build the Docker image tagging it as registry.gitlab.com/barkerja/hal, push it to the registry, and finally send another webhook indicating the build is complete.
